title: crepis cichoroides
intro: Crepis cichoroides, also known as rosinweed or western rosinweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to North America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high resin content, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crepis cichoroides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even help with skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Crepis cichoroides can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
